title: CC narrative review S13 panel a1

payload.notes: Panel: panels/S13_panel_a01.png | Beat B08 sub-2 = the DIAGNOSIS moment after REJECT (caption "研究不是一直往前 / Research doesn't always go forward"). STORY READ: the diagnosis beat lands — the duo is back at the research-wiki surface, oriented toward the graph/rollback target, and the cell delivers the 'we step back to understand WHY it failed' pivot without leaking S14's K3->I-K3 invariant upgrade or S15's RE-RUN ENFORCED badge. narrative_beat_fidelity 4: the diagnosis/setback-reflection beat reads clearly, but the failed-attempt node being diagnosed is only implied by the duo's gaze rather than visually foregrounded as a distinct rejected-branch element, so the 'doesn't always go forward' meaning leans on the caption. composition_story 5: reading order is clean, the duo and the wiki surface compose the eye toward the diagnosis action, and the upper-left / left-side safe_zone is open to receive the HTML caption layer without competing for the anchor. NARRATIVE VERDICT: PASS on story (no beat-level rejection); cell stays distinct from S12 (rollback entry) and S14-S15. Visual identity-lock / artifact / safezone-cleanliness are NOT my call — left to the visual reviewers.
